CIT.notes: CIT 22% flat; no local CIT surcharges; tonnage tax for shipping; no separate regional/municipal CIT

VAT.notes: Single standard rate 25% (MOMS); no reduced rates in Denmark except zero-rated newspapers; one of EU's highest VAT rates

IIT.notes: Top state tax 15% on income >DKK 588,900 (2025); municipal avg ~25%; bottom state 12.16%; AM-bidrag (labor market) 8%; effective top marginal ~56%; no wealth tax
